summary: Iteration 64 - Production Studio owner_id FIX VERIFIED. Both critical bugs are fixed: 1) Dashboard 'Film in Attesa di Rilascio' section always visible with 2 pending films. 2) Production Studio 3 tabs (Pre-Produzione, Post-Produzione, Agenzia Casting) now open correctly after backend fix changing user_id to owner_id in 5 queries.

issues: Donation popup appears frequently and blocks UI interactions. Must dismiss with Escape key.

backend.GET /api/production-studio/status: PASS - Returns studio Level 1 data, 2 pending films, 10 released films
backend.GET /api/production-studio/casting: PASS - Returns 4 weekly recruits with 25% discount
backend.POST /api/production-studio/generate-dra: PASS - Generated draft 'Test Draft Iter64' (Comedy, +4% quality bonus)
backend.GET /api/production-studio/drafts: PASS - Returns 4 drafts (3x Test Draft Iter64, Ombra Mortale)
backend.POST /api/production-studio/pre-producti: PASS - Applied storyboard bonus to 'Il Ritorno del Gladiatore' (+7% quality)
backend.Infrastructure ownership: PASS - User owns 4 infrastructures: cinema, drive_in, cinema_school, production_studio

frontend.Dashboard pending films count: PASS - Shows 2 pending films: 'Test Film', 'Il Ritorno del Gladiatore'
frontend.Dashboard Rilascia buttons: PASS - 2 Rilascia buttons visible with data-testid='release-btn-{id}'
frontend.Production Studio card clickable: PASS - Opens detail dialog when clicked
frontend.Pre-Produzione tab: PASS - Opens panel showing 2 pending films with pre-production bonus buttons
frontend.Post-Produzione tab: PASS - Opens panel showing 3 released films with Remaster buttons
frontend.Agenzia Casting tab: PASS - Opens panel showing 4 casting recruits with discounts

critical_code_review_comments: The owner_id fix in server.py lines 9472-9790 correctly resolves the production studio tab issue
Dashboard.jsx line 362-405 correctly shows pending films section always visible
ProductionStudioPanel.jsx properly implements all 3 tabs with data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Generated multiple 'Test Draft Iter64' screenplay drafts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs are FIXED. Production Studio owner_id fix working correctly - all 5 queries now use owner_id. Dashboard pending films section always visible. User fandrex1@gmail.com owns Level 1 production_studio. Pre-production storyboard bonus was applied to 'Il Ritorno del Gladiatore' during testing.

verified_features.Bug Fix 1 - Dashboard Pending Films: VERIFIED - Section shows with 2 pending films even when user has them
verified_features.Bug Fix 2 - Production Studio Tabs: VERIFIED - All 3 tabs (Pre-Produzione, Post-Produzione, Agenzia Casting) open correctly and show appropriate data
